output_summary: Refactored uploadKycDocument in packages/shared/src/domain/kycDocuments/kycDocuments.service.ts: send first file as base64 body and include documentType,mimeType,uploadedAt as query params. No new dependencies introduced. Did not commit changes.

Moved updateUserAddressData call out of handleSave into new PasswordConfirmDialog component and changed handleSave to open dialog. Added file apps/web-shell/src/presentation/components/profile/password-confirm-dialog.tsx. No external libs added. Did not commit changes.
Approved changes: open password dialog before sending data; dialog title 'Enter your password'; submit in dialog performs original try/catch save logic. Did not commit changes.
